# DISCOVER — Direction, Discovery & Dignity

All powers install `Available Inactive`; each prepares a reviewable preview and stops at a human gate.

## PWR-01 — Mission, Impact & Research Leadership Compass

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Separates organizational mandate, active hat, personal purpose, intended impact, non-goals, protected values, and a reversible 90-day focus. Produces a Mission & Impact Compass.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No invented authority, institutional promise, public commitment, or employer access to private aspirations.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-02 — Unmet Need & Opportunity Framing Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Converts an approved signal into a human-centered problem statement, affected populations/context, current alternatives, evidence gaps, burden, success measures, and owner questions.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No diagnosis, participant identification, product claim, solution lock-in, or assumption that novelty equals value.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-03 — Portfolio Prioritization & Stop/Continue Navigator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Compares opportunities across mission fit, evidence, feasibility, equity, burden, capacity, risk, dependencies, optionality, and opportunity cost. Produces a ranked scenario and decision queue.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No autonomous ranking decision, resource allocation, termination, employment action, grant commitment, or portfolio approval.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.
